input.content:
name: Dependency License Check

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  MANIFEST_PATH: fixtures/package.json
  CONFIG_PATH: fixtures/license-config.json
  LICENSE_DATA_PATH: fixtures/license-data.json

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }

  compliance:
    name: License compliance report
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Generate compliance report
        id: report
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          . ./LicenseChecker.ps1
          $data = Get-Content -LiteralPath $env:LICENSE_DATA_PATH -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json -AsHashtable
          $lookup = { param($n,$v) $data[$n] }.GetNewClosure()
          $report = Invoke-LicenseCheck `
              -ManifestPath $env:MANIFEST_PATH `
              -ConfigPath   $env:CONFIG_PATH `
              -LicenseLookup $lookup
          $text = Format-ComplianceReport -Report $report
          Write-Output $text
          $text | Set-Content compliance-report.txt
          $denied = @($report | Where-Object Status -eq 'denied').Count
          Write-Output "DENIED_COUNT=$denied"
          if ($denied -gt 0) {
            Write-Output "::warning::Denied licenses found: $denied"
          }

name: Dependency License Check

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  MANIFEST_PATH: fixtures/package.json
  CONFIG_PATH: fixtures/license-config.json
  LICENSE_DATA_PATH: fixtures/license-data.json

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }

  compliance:
    name: License compliance report
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Generate compliance report
        id: report
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          . ./LicenseChecker.ps1
          $data = Get-Content -LiteralPath $env:LICENSE_DATA_PATH -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json -AsHashtable
          $lookup = { param($n,$v) $data[$n] }.GetNewClosure()
          $report = Invoke-LicenseCheck `
              -ManifestPath $env:MANIFEST_PATH `
              -ConfigPath   $env:CONFIG_PATH `
              -LicenseLookup $lookup
          $text = Format-ComplianceReport -Report $report
          Write-Output $text
          $text | Set-Content compliance-report.txt
          $denied = @($report | Where-Object Status -eq 'denied').Count
          Write-Output "DENIED_COUNT=$denied"
          if ($denied -gt 0) {
            Write-Output "::warning::Denied licenses found: $denied"
          }
